chunks.title: Dynamic Component Styling.mp3
chunks.text: Next we are going to discuss Dynamic Component Styling

chunks.title: Dynamic Component Styling.mp3
chunks.text: Dynamic Component Styling means that when we want to add any style to our components based on some condition

chunks.title: Dynamic Component Styling.mp3
chunks.text: We can also call it Conditional Component Styling or Dynamic

chunks.title: Dynamic Component Styling.mp3
chunks.text: Basically it is decided at run time

chunks.title: Dynamic Component Styling.mp3
chunks.text: For example, when we have displayed our products

chunks.title: Dynamic Component Styling.mp3
chunks.text: The products that have a discount on the products, let's suppose we want to set our background color to pink

chunks.title: Dynamic Component Styling.mp3
chunks.text: How can we implement that?

chunks.title: Dynamic Component Styling.mp3
chunks.text: Because it depends on the condition of the product that the price is greater than 3000

chunks.title: Dynamic Component Styling.mp3
chunks.text: So how can we change our style based on some condition?

chunks.title: Dynamic Component Styling.mp3
chunks.text: Now the only way to do this is to create a new class in our product.css file

chunks.title: Dynamic Component Styling.mp3
chunks.text: And check on the condition on run time or on the basis of the condition that if our condition is satisfied

chunks.title: Dynamic Component Styling.mp3
chunks.text: Then our class should be added here

chunks.title: Dynamic Component Styling.mp3
chunks.text: But if we say another better or standard way to do this

chunks.title: Dynamic Component Styling.mp3
chunks.text: So basically we can define our styles here only in our component that we want to show dynamically

chunks.title: Dynamic Component Styling.mp3
chunks.text: Now first of all let's see any style based on some condition and not on a normal style

chunks.title: Dynamic Component Styling.mp3
chunks.text: For example, for now we want all three divs to be blue for our background color

chunks.title: Dynamic Component Styling.mp3
chunks.text: So if we want to define this style, we can make a variable here

chunks.title: Dynamic Component Styling.mp3
chunks.text: Let styles is equal to

chunks.title: Dynamic Component Styling.mp3
chunks.text: And in styles we can write background color is equal to blue

chunks.title: Dynamic Component Styling.mp3
chunks.text: So in this way we can create an object named styles

chunks.title: Dynamic Component Styling.mp3
chunks.text: And in that object we can set the background color to blue

chunks.title: Dynamic Component Styling.mp3
chunks.text: Now one thing to keep in mind that we discussed earlier

chunks.title: Dynamic Component Styling.mp3
chunks.text: That whatever elements we write in normal styling CSS

chunks.title: Dynamic Component Styling.mp3
chunks.text: Generally if we want to write things in CSS, then we will write background color with hyphen

chunks.title: Dynamic Component Styling.mp3
chunks.text: But whenever we write things in JSX format

chunks.title: Dynamic Component Styling.mp3
chunks.text: Means whenever we write our styles here, then they will be converted into camel case

chunks.title: Dynamic Component Styling.mp3
chunks.text: If there is background color, then it will be a background color

chunks.title: Dynamic Component Styling.mp3
chunks.text: If there is margin bottom, then it will be margin bottom

chunks.title: Dynamic Component Styling.mp3
chunks.text: If there is font size, then it will be font size

chunks.title: Dynamic Component Styling.mp3
chunks.text: If there is hyphen, then it will be converted into camel case

chunks.title: Dynamic Component Styling.mp3
chunks.text: If there is border radius, then we will write border radius in JSX

chunks.title: Dynamic Component Styling.mp3
chunks.text: Name is same, so the way to write it is changing

chunks.title: Dynamic Component Styling.mp3
chunks.text: So we can define a variable first, then we can give styles name, ABC name, anything

chunks.title: Dynamic Component Styling.mp3
chunks.text: In this array we have defined some style

chunks.title: Dynamic Component Styling.mp3
chunks.text: Now we want this div to be given, so for that we have a property named style

chunks.title: Dynamic Component Styling.mp3
chunks.text: In which value is equal to curly braces, we can assign the array with our styles name

chunks.title: Dynamic Component Styling.mp3
chunks.text: Save it, refresh it, so this time all the divs background color is blue

chunks.title: Dynamic Component Styling.mp3
chunks.text: We can also set a lighter color, we can call it yellow

chunks.title: Dynamic Component Styling.mp3
chunks.text: So all the divs are yellow

chunks.title: Dynamic Component Styling.mp3
chunks.text: So this is possible for us to show this

chunks.title: Dynamic Component Styling.mp3
chunks.text: But what is happening here? All the divs are getting styles here, there is no condition

chunks.title: Dynamic Component Styling.mp3
chunks.text: Generally when we want to do all the divs or if we want to do the background color of H3

chunks.title: Dynamic Component Styling.mp3
chunks.text: We can add styling here as well

chunks.title: Dynamic Component Styling.mp3
chunks.text: Save, refresh

chunks.title: Dynamic Component Styling.mp3
chunks.text: So now we are getting background color, only H3

chunks.title: Dynamic Component Styling.mp3
chunks.text: But we don't want this

chunks.title: Dynamic Component Styling.mp3
chunks.text: We want to add styling on a condition

chunks.title: Dynamic Component Styling.mp3
chunks.text: Because if we want to give all the elements and components in style, then we can write it in CSS file

chunks.title: Dynamic Component Styling.mp3
chunks.text: We can check the condition in JSX

chunks.title: Dynamic Component Styling.mp3
chunks.text: It is not possible to check the conditions in CSS

chunks.title: Dynamic Component Styling.mp3
chunks.text: To check our conditions, we can write here that if our price is greater than 30,000

chunks.title: Dynamic Component Styling.mp3
chunks.text: Then we will write our ternary operator here

chunks.title: Dynamic Component Styling.mp3
chunks.text: So in that case, the value of the background color should be yellow

chunks.title: Dynamic Component Styling.mp3
chunks.text: And in other cases, we want to keep the value of the background color null

chunks.title: Dynamic Component Styling.mp3
chunks.text: So let's save it and if we refresh this time, then the background color is only coming from the product

chunks.title: Dynamic Component Styling.mp3
chunks.text: So how this was possible?

chunks.title: Dynamic Component Styling.mp3
chunks.text: When we defined the area of size, then we applied the condition on the value of the background color

chunks.title: Dynamic Component Styling.mp3
chunks.text: In this way, the condition, the statement, it is also possible to write in JavaScript, it is completely valid

chunks.title: Dynamic Component Styling.mp3
chunks.text: If our price value is greater than 30,000, then the value should be yellow in that case, and the value should be null in other cases

chunks.title: Dynamic Component Styling.mp3
chunks.text: We can change the color here, the value should be pink, then we will get the value of the discount

chunks.title: Dynamic Component Styling.mp3
chunks.text: So if we want to apply any condition on the basis of style, then we can apply it in this way

chunks.title: Dynamic Component Styling.mp3
chunks.text: Now in one thing in code, we will notice that the price is greater than 30,000, the price is greater than 30,000

chunks.title: Dynamic Component Styling.mp3
chunks.text: It is repeated for us

chunks.title: Dynamic Component Styling.mp3
chunks.text: So we can shift this thing to a variable named as isDiscount

chunks.title: Dynamic Component Styling.mp3
chunks.text: And in this variable, we can simply write price is greater than 30,000, what value will be for us

chunks.title: Dynamic Component Styling.mp3
chunks.text: And here we can check, is there some discount?

chunks.title: Dynamic Component Styling.mp3
chunks.text: And here we can also write is there some discount?

chunks.title: Dynamic Component Styling.mp3
chunks.text: No change will come in our UI, because all things are done in the same way

chunks.title: Dynamic Component Styling.mp3
chunks.text: We have just tried to improve our code a little

text: Next we are going to discuss Dynamic Component Styling Dynamic Component Styling means that when we want to add any style to our components based on some condition We can also call it Conditional Component Styling or Dynamic Basically it is decided at run time For example, when we have displayed our products The products that have a discount on the products, let's suppose we want to set our background color to pink How can we implement that? Because it depends on the condition of the product that the price is greater than 3000 So how can we change our style based on some condition? Now the only way to do this is to create a new class in our product.css file And check on the condition on run time or on the basis of the condition that if our condition is satisfied Then our class should be added here But if we say another better or standard way to do this So basically we can define our styles here only in our component that we want to show dynamically Now first of all let's see any style based on some condition and not on a normal style For example, for now we want all three divs to be blue for our background color So if we want to define this style, we can make a variable here Let styles is equal to And in styles we can write background color is equal to blue So in this way we can create an object named styles And in that object we can set the background color to blue Now one thing to keep in mind that we discussed earlier That whatever elements we write in normal styling CSS Generally if we want to write things in CSS, then we will write background color with hyphen But whenever we write things in JSX format Means whenever we write our styles here, then they will be converted into camel case If there is background color, then it will be a background color If there is margin bottom, then it will be margin bottom If there is font size, then it will be font size If there is hyphen, then it will be converted into camel case If there is border radius, then we will write border radius in JSX Name is same, so the way to write it is changing So we can define a variable first, then we can give styles name, ABC name, anything In this array we have defined some style Now we want this div to be given, so for that we have a property named style In which value is equal to curly braces, we can assign the array with our styles name Save it, refresh it, so this time all the divs background color is blue We can also set a lighter color, we can call it yellow So all the divs are yellow So this is possible for us to show this But what is happening here? All the divs are getting styles here, there is no condition Generally when we want to do all the divs or if we want to do the background color of H3 We can add styling here as well Save, refresh So now we are getting background color, only H3 But we don't want this We want to add styling on a condition Because if we want to give all the elements and components in style, then we can write it in CSS file We can check the condition in JSX It is not possible to check the conditions in CSS To check our conditions, we can write here that if our price is greater than 30,000 Then we will write our ternary operator here So in that case, the value of the background color should be yellow And in other cases, we want to keep the value of the background color null So let's save it and if we refresh this time, then the background color is only coming from the product So how this was possible? When we defined the area of size, then we applied the condition on the value of the background color In this way, the condition, the statement, it is also possible to write in JavaScript, it is completely valid If our price value is greater than 30,000, then the value should be yellow in that case, and the value should be null in other cases We can change the color here, the value should be pink, then we will get the value of the discount So if we want to apply any condition on the basis of style, then we can apply it in this way Now in one thing in code, we will notice that the price is greater than 30,000, the price is greater than 30,000 It is repeated for us So we can shift this thing to a variable named as isDiscount And in this variable, we can simply write price is greater than 30,000, what value will be for us And here we can check, is there some discount? And here we can also write is there some discount? No change will come in our UI, because all things are done in the same way We have just tried to improve our code a little
